metadata.description: Niche Agent Skills for nonprofit development teams in the Research Triangle (Durham · Raleigh · Chapel Hill · RTP, NC): audit-ready CSRD/ESG impact reporting, Triangle-specific funder intelligence, and bilingual (EN/ES) donor appeals.

plugins.name: triangle-dev
plugins.description: Three wedge skills for Triangle-area nonprofit development: impact-report-builder (audit-ready CSRD/ESG/GRI/SASB outcomes), triangle-funder-intel (regional prospect research), and bilingual-appeal-engine (EN/ES cultural transcreation). Reads/writes a shared knowledge base seeded by a SessionStart org-brief hook.
